events: Hwang Eunseo prepares apology speech for student council election
Rehearsal check with class president
Election speeches begin
Hwang Eunseo delivers masterful apology speech
Kim Yul gives standing ovation
Broadcasting club president plays incriminating video
Hwang Eunseo's life collapses in public
cause_effect: Hwang Eunseo's narcissism makes him believe he can manipulate the situation
Class president has been planning betrayal all along
Evidence videos were sent to media that morning
notes: The speech is a masterpiece of manipulation - Hwang Eunseo genuinely believes he's performing brilliantly. The standing ovation from Kim Yul is ironic given what's about to happen.

events: Class president reveals true plan on stage
Presents 103 tapes, 311 videos, 30,790 photos as evidence
Reports Hwang Eunseo to police with victim Kim Yul pressing charges
Evidence already sent to media outlets
Hwang Eunseo attacks class president physically
Stage cleared by Tower judgment
Director scolds Death King for 'stealing half the revenge'
Constellation Killer accepts Kim Yul's memories and feelings
cause_effect: Class president's meticulous planning over two weeks leads to perfect public takedown
Hwang Eunseo's violence on stage becomes additional evidence
The trauma/stage ends when justice is served
notes: Director uses Wu Zixu allegory to scold Death King for doing too much himself. The stage was cleared by 'The Lord of Manseng' instead of normal Tower voice.

events: Constellation Killer lists hundreds of Constellations he killed
Acknowledges he must receive revenge of the worlds
Death King gives him 'The Epic of Lefanta Aegim' book
Constellation Killer accepts book to remember his life
Constellation Killer accepts director's forgiveness
Director breaks down emotionally
Death King realizes he wants to 'prove' people's screams/existence
Death King decides to reform Infernal Heavens Demonic Art
Librarian offers Constellation Killer and Director positions as librarians
cause_effect: Remembering is the first step to redemption
The Librarian's love of stories makes him offer positions to his favorite characters
Death King's new purpose: prove that people lived and suffered
notes: The chapter is titled 'Prologue (1)' - marking the end of one story and beginning of another. Death King wants to embed children's dance, Preta's scream, Master's blade, Raviel's sacrifice, and Director's silence into his martial art.

events: Librarian reveals other worlds' Hunters chose easy/helpful Apocalypses only
Shows example of Hunters hiding in cave waiting for Heavenly Demon to die
Shows example of apostle trying to woo Raviel with flowers and failing
Death King reveals he planned to recruit Librarian from the snowy mountain day
Librarian's favorability is 99, favorite characters now list Death King before Kim Yul
Death King reveals Librarian no longer has purpose since Constellation Killer won't kill him
Proposes Librarian become 30th floor of Tower
Librarian's real name is Hamustra (simplified pronunciation of ■■■■■)
cause_effect: Death King's persistent character-driven approach makes Librarian love him more than Constellation Killer
By saving Constellation Killer, Death King destroyed Librarian's original dream
Death King offers new dream: become a character in their story
notes: The Librarian's original dream was to die by Constellation Killer's hands as perfect epilogue. Death King outmaneuvered him by saving the Constellation Killer.

events: Flashback to Pond of Accumulating Memories meeting Lord of Manseng
Lord of Manseng is building a Tower, recruits Hamustra as tenant
Hamustra signs contract to become Corner Librarian
Back to present: Death King convinces Hamustra to join them
Hamustra gives Death King his life-book [■■■■■]
Death King declares they'll ascend Tower together
cause_effect: Hamustra's curiosity and love of stories made him sign original contract
Death King uses same appeal - offering to be in a story together
The book contains Hamustra's entire existence
notes: Lord of Manseng's motivation: 'Everyone should be able to live one more life.' Hamustra is 'The Pond of Accumulating Memories.'

events: The Librarian's Apocalypse floods library with white light
Tower warns Librarian about immense penalty for clearing
Librarian stripped of title and authority
Librarian loses ability to fly
Becomes cafe employee at Library Cafe Planetarium
Death King grants his wish: white mocha frappuccino
Raviel wears school uniform and drinks cider while Death King holds her
Raviel reveals 'A Regressor's Love' skill - she regresses when he does
Death King punished by holding Raviel for hours
cause_effect: Librarian's choice to become a Hunter strips him of Constellation powers
Raviel's regression skill means she experienced Death King's death too
The 30th floor becomes a rest/recuperation area
notes: Raviel knew immediately when Death King died: 'I don't know where, but a bitch just touched my wife.' Golden Silk witnessed this and felt cosmic horror.

events: Death King video calls childhood friend Kim Hanbija (now National Assembly member)
Politician tries to use Death King's fame for election
Death King asks about Hwang Eunseo
Sword Saint and Death King spar - Death King wins for first time
Death King reveals 'unfinished move': Infernal Heavens Reformation First Formula - The Burning Young Sword
Uses image of burning house with children to power aura
skills: Infernal Heavens Reformation - First Formula: The Burning Young Sword
cause_effect: Death King's shamelessness in battle catches Sword Saint off guard
Using Bae Hu-ryeong connection as distraction proves effective
The new martial art formula embeds traumatic memories into attacks
notes: Sword Saint had 52 wins out of 53 fights before this. Death King is now genuinely competitive with top ranker.

characters: The Lady Who Walks Through the Mirage
events: 31st floor opening ceremony
Top 7 hunters gather
Lady explains Race War concept: choose a race to guide
Options: put all 700 points in one race or distribute 100 each to 7 races
Sword Saint chooses to distribute for diversity
Each hunter selects a race:
- Sword Saint: Pure Race (Human)
- Death King: Dokkaebi Race (Goblin)
- Black Dragon Master: Bloodsucking Race (Vampire)
- Heretic Questioner: Snail Race (Slug)
- Count: Fairy Race (Elf)
- Venomous Snake: Noble Race (Sprite)
- Crusader: Ocean Race (Mermaid)
Death King reveals his trump card: Goblin High Society skill
cause_effect: Death King's F-rank Goblin High Society skill suddenly becomes relevant
The 31st-40th floors form a continuous civilization-building arc
Hunters become guardian constellations/gods for their chosen races
notes: Death King's choice of goblins shocks everyone. The skill Goblin High Society was copied from Great King Goblin monster long ago and seemed useless until now.

characters: The Lady Who Walks Through the Mirage
events: Race selection completed
Lady gives 100 race points to each hunter
Civilization Store revealed with purchasable items
31st floor quest: evacuate race from volcanic eruption
Crusader buys Oracle Message but it fails - primitive races don't understand language
Death King figures out the problem: language barrier
Death King buys Prey Search and Animal Possession
Possesses white lion to lead goblins
Uses Goblin High Society skill to communicate with goblins
Goblins create primitive religion: White Lion Religion
First achievement: 500 bonus race points
Leads goblins to new settlement
cause_effect: Primitive races can't understand complex language, requiring creative solutions
Animal possession allows physical guidance without words
Goblin High Society enables basic communication with goblins
Creating religion gives massive bonus points
notes: Civilization Store items include: Oracle Message (20), Animal Possession (40), Dream Appearance (100), Prey Search (5), Settlement Search (80), etc. Death King becomes literal God of Goblins.

events: Goblins safely evacuated from volcano
Other races also escape via animal possession
Quest cleared: 300 race points reward
Death King has 855 total points
Buys Search for Bronze-Ranked Settlement (80 points)
Names new settlement 'Guru'
Death King rejects stage clear to do more preparation
Teaches goblins pictographic writing using mud drawings
Goblins develop 'Legacy of Records' talent
Goblins gain 'Primitive Fashionista' trait (tattoo culture)
cause_effect: Teaching goblins to draw pictographs replaces need for expensive Text item (4500 points)
Mud tattoos change 'Victims of Racial Discrimination' trait to 'Primitive Fashionista'
Goblins develop culture and identity through art
notes: Death King draws symbols: ■=mud/ground, O=sky/day, ●=night, ☆=sun, ★=moon, ~=water. Goblins create combination symbols like O■=world, ●~=rain.

events: Death King continues developing goblin civilization
Teaches hunting and gathering
Goblins become Hunter-Gatherers
Teaches numbers using Roman numerals (I, II, III)
Goblins struggle with concepts above 6
Other hunters declare stage clear one by one
Heretic Questioner stays behind - doesn't declare clear
Death King finally declares clear after exhausting all teachable content
cause_effect: Death King's extended stay allows maximum development of goblins
Heretic Questioner's decision to stay will have massive consequences
Goblins develop from mud-playing primitives to organized hunters
notes: Death King leaves the white lion body far from village to avoid hurting goblins. Goblins cry 'Kekerkker' (his name) when they realize he's gone.

characters: The Lady Who Walks Through the Mirage
events: Hunters arrive at 32nd floor waiting room
Only 200 years passed (instead of expected 1000+)
Lady reveals Heretic Questioner already on 32nd floor
32nd floor is underground city
Snail civilization has become dominant empire
Other races are slaves: sprites, vampires, mermaids, goblins
Heretic Questioner reveals he stayed 200 years with snails
Created 'Rime' religion using snails' unique vocal ability
cause_effect: Heretic Questioner staying 200 years allowed snails to accelerate development massively
Snails' unique ability to say 'Rime' became basis for religious supremacy
Other races enslaved because they invaded and lost, or were conquered
notes: The Lady made plushies of all seven races. Heretic Questioner possessed 34 generations of white dogs, regarded as divine beasts. Welsh Corgi sphinx statue.

events: Heretic Questioner explains Rime religion philosophy
Religion provides meaning and dispels fear of unknown
Uses Mother Goddess mythology to explain natural phenomena
Salt is 'Holy Teeth' of goddess
Goblins work as gladiators/sword fighters in colosseum
32nd floor quest revealed: rescue races from Snail Empire oppression
Heretic Questioner's quest: defend empire and prevent escape
Conflicting objectives between hunters
cause_effect: Heretic Questioner's 200-year guidance created highly organized religious civilization
Goblins' combat ability makes them favored gladiators
The quest pits hunters against each other
notes: Heretic Questioner's philosophy: 'People need a reason to love a flower, even if it's only to shed tears on it. God grants them infinite reasons!'

events: Hunters debate whether to surrender to Heretic Questioner or fight
Heretic Questioner argues his method saves time and lives overall
Death King visits goblin quarters in salt mines
Goblins live in pits, work day and night shifts
Goblins called 'Molds' (slur by snails)
Older female goblins sneak children out for water
Goblins maintain tattoo culture even in slavery
Death King considers regressing to change history
Bae Hu-ryeong argues against regression - trusts the goblins
Goblins sneak out at night into secret mine passages
cause_effect: Heretic Questioner's 200-year guidance created dominant empire but at cost of slavery
Goblins maintain secret culture and organization despite oppression
Bae Hu-ryeong advises trusting the people they raised rather than controlling everything
notes: The goblins call Death King 'Kekerkker' - his name in their language. Slur 'Molds' comes from 'ork' sounding similar to goblin speech. Tower announces: 'The Goblin Race has created a secret assembly.'
